summary: Data Privacy Dashboard feature testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified. All 4 API endpoints working correctly with proper authentication and role-based access control.

minor_improvements.issue: Route allows students to navigate to page (gets API 403, data not exposed)

tests: Tenant admin sees own tenant only
Returns 6 PII fields with AES-256-GCM encryption
Super admin can run dry run
Tenant admin can run dry run for own tenant
Fields: phone, emergency_contact, emergency_contact_phone, emergency_contact_name, medical_info, preferred_contact
Tenant admin sees own tenant only
Opens dialog with dry run results
Shows count of fields to encrypt
Shows 'All PII already encrypted' when 100% coverage
Super Admin Dashboard has Data Privacy button
College Admin Dashboard has Data Privacy card

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Role-based access control working - students get 403 on all privacy endpoints
✓ Super admin sees all tenants, tenant admin sees own tenant only
✓ Dry run mode correctly previews without making changes
✓ Audit logging captures migration events with admin email and timestamp
✓ All data-testid attributes present for testing
Minor: Frontend route /college-admin/privacy only checks login, not role (backend enforces 403)
seed_data_creation: Previous migrations created audit log entries

All privacy endpoints require admin role - students get 403. Encryption uses AES-256-GCM. Migration dry run shows preview without changes.
